text.title: Definition of Done Library — Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every application of Definition of Done Library must enforce.

rule.statement: DoDs are indexed by deliverable type (story / feature / release / contractor task).
rule.rationale: Flat DoD lists invite copy-paste reuse on the wrong deliverable; typed indexing prevents that.

rule.statement: Every DoD item carries a rationale.
rule.rationale: Rationale-less items get pruned under deadline pressure; rationale defends the item.
<3 items leaves too much room for interpretation.

rule.statement: Every library record carries a named owner who reviews quarterly.
rule.rationale: Anonymous libraries rot; owned libraries refresh.

rule.statement: Library reviewed quarterly; last_reviewed bumped on every refresh.
rule.rationale: Without cadence, the library encodes 6-month-old norms.
